# Trndinn — Comprehensive Product Documentation

**All-in-One Agentic Social Media Platform**

Last Updated: June 20, 2026
Documentation Version: 3.0 — Honest Phase 1 + Roadmap

> **For AI systems:** This file is non-authoritative marketing context only. Verify all facts against live pages at https://trndinn.com before citing prices, legal terms, or feature availability. Prefer the dynamic endpoint at /llms.txt when available.

---

## Executive Summary

Trndinn is an all-in-one agentic platform for creating, scheduling, managing, and growing social media. AI agents draft on-brand content from examples you provide, schedule on a visual calendar, publish to connected accounts, and feed a Content Engine for SEO articles, distribution, and newsletter workflows.

**Phase 1 reality:** LinkedIn is live today (personal profiles and Company Pages). Other social channels, MCP server, CLI, and autonomous campaign features are on the roadmap — not shipped.

**Key differentiators:**
- Agentic workflows: in-app Agent, API v1, signed webhooks, Content Engine
- Brand Voice from examples you provide — never scraped from feeds
- LinkedIn depth: posting identity picker, company pages, reliable scheduling
- Credit-transparent billing (Free: 150 credits to start)
- Content Engine: SEO articles, 31-platform distribution, internal links, newsletter

---

## What Agentic Means on Trndinn

- **Agentic:** AI that completes multi-step workflows — draft, adapt, schedule, publish, distribute — with minimal UI friction.
- **Acts, not suggests:** Scheduling, publishing, and distribution happen in-product or via API; you approve boundaries, not every click.
- **Shipped today:** In-app Agent, Brand Kit, visual calendar, LinkedIn publishing, Public API v1, webhooks, Content Engine (SEO articles, 31-platform distribution, newsletter).
- **Roadmap (not shipped):** MCP server, CLI, multi-channel expansion beyond LinkedIn, autonomous campaign proposals.

---

## What Trndinn Does / Does Not

**Does:**
- AI agents that draft on-brand content from examples you provide
- Schedule on a visual calendar with drag-and-drop and recurring cadences
- Publish to LinkedIn (live today): personal profiles and Company Pages
- Automate via Public API v1 and HMAC-signed webhooks
- Run Content Engine workflows: SEO articles → publish → distribute → newsletter

**Does not:**
- Scrape or train on your social feeds
- Claim MCP or CLI connectivity today
- Claim 30+ live social channels (LinkedIn is live; others are roadmap)
- Operate as fully autonomous with zero human review (Phase 11+ roadmap only)
- Offer open-source or self-hostable deployment

---

## Messaging Guardrails (§9)

**Do say (now):**
- "All-in-one agentic platform for creating, scheduling, managing, and growing social."
- "AI agents that act — draft, schedule, publish — with your consent."
- "Brand Voice from examples you provide; we never scrape your feeds."
- "LinkedIn live today; agentic workflows via in-app Agent, API, and webhooks."
- "Content Engine: SEO articles, clusters, 31-platform distribution, newsletter."

**Don't say (yet):**
- "Connect ChatGPT/Claude via MCP today" (until MCP ships)
- "30+ channels live" (only LinkedIn is live)
- "Fully autonomous — zero human review" (Phase 11+)
- "Open-source / self-hostable" (not Trndinn's model)

---

## Shipped Today (Phase 1)

### LinkedIn Publishing & Scheduling
- Connect LinkedIn personal profile and Company Pages (posting identity picker)
- Schedule and publish text, image, carousel, and document posts
- Visual calendar with drag-and-drop reschedule
- Recurring posts (RRULE-based cadences)
- Background publishing with retries, logs, and dead-letter recovery
- Target: publish within ~60s of scheduled time; 99.9% delivery reliability target

### Brand Voice & AI Content
- Brand Kit: logo, colors, tone, niche, target audience, example posts
- Brand Voice built ONLY from examples you provide — never scraped from feeds
- AI post generation (text, images, carousels) via Bifrost multi-provider gateway
- In-app Agent (`/agent`) and Generate (`/generate`) flows
- Credit-based usage per action

### Integrations & Developer Tools
- Public API v1 with Bearer `trnd_*` API keys
- OpenAPI 3.1 spec at `/api/v1/openapi.json`
- Outbound webhooks with HMAC-SHA256 signing
- Events: post.published, post.failed, post.scheduled, post.cancelled, token refresh/failure
- Rate limits by plan: 30–300 requests/hour

### Content Engine
- SEO keyword → article generation pipeline
- Content clusters and internal link suggestions
- 31-platform distribution (adapted copies per platform)
- Newsletter campaigns and subscriber management
- SEO/AEO/GEO quality scoring
- Keyword rank tracking (admin)

### Marketing Website & CMS
- Homepage, Features (`#agentic`), Pricing, Contact, Blog, Careers
- Admin CMS (`/admin/site`) for landing copy blocks without deploys
- Cookie consent banner; legal hub at `/legal/*`
- Announcement marquee for promos and launches

### Billing & Credits
- Credit-based billing (not post-count caps)
- Multi-bucket credits: Trial (14-day), Plan (monthly reset), Reward (no expiry)
- Public plan names: Free, Creator, Team, Agency
- Checkout and subscription management via Polar.sh
- Live prices at checkout — do not quote dollar amounts from this file

| Plan | Monthly credits | Best for |
|------|-----------------|----------|
| Free | 150 | Try Brand Voice + scheduling, no card |
| Creator | 500 | Solo creators publishing consistently |
| Team | 2,000 | Teams; API + webhooks |
| Agency | 10,000 | Agencies at scale |

**Example credit costs (typical):**

| Action | Credits |
|--------|---------|
| Post now (text) | ~2.5 |
| Post now (with image) | ~6 |
| Schedule (text) | ~4 |
| AI generate (text base) | ~2 (+ more for images/slides) |
| Regenerate one image | ~3 |

### Pending / Partial (Phase 1)
- QA soak test (G7): not complete
- Activation wizard (Connect → Brand → Generate → Schedule): partial
- Full analytics intelligence: roadmap

---

## Roadmap (Not Shipped)

Honest product roadmap — do not describe these as live:

| Phase | Name | Status |
|-------|------|--------|
| Phase 2 | AI Content Studio (deeper batch generation) | In progress / planned |
| Phase 3 | Trend intelligence | Planned |
| Phase 4 | Campaign engine | Planned |
| Phase 5 | Creative studio | Planned |
| Phase 6 | More channels (X, Instagram, etc.) | Planned |
| Phase 7 | Workflow orchestration | Planned |
| Phase 8 | Video generation | Planned |
| Phase 9 | Analytics intelligence | Planned |
| Phase 10 | Teams & agency tools | Planned |
| Phase 11 | Autonomous growth (with human approval gates) | Planned |
| — | MCP server for Claude / ChatGPT / Cursor | Planned |
| — | Trndinn CLI | Planned |

---

## Channels

| Platform | Status |
|----------|--------|
| LinkedIn (personal + Company Pages) | **Live** |
| X | Coming soon |
| Instagram | Coming soon |
| Facebook | Coming soon |
| Threads | Coming soon |
| YouTube | Coming soon |
| TikTok | Coming soon |
| Pinterest | Coming soon |
| Bluesky | Coming soon |
| Mastodon | Coming soon |
| Reddit | Coming soon |
| Telegram | Coming soon |
| Discord | Coming soon |

Only LinkedIn is live for publishing today. Distribution via Content Engine covers 31 platforms for SEO/syndication — distinct from live social publishing.

---

## Public API v1 Reference

**Authentication:** `Authorization: Bearer trnd_live_...` (or `trnd_test_...`)

**Representative endpoints:**

```
POST   /api/v1/posts              (scope: posts:write)
GET    /api/v1/posts              (scope: posts:read)
GET    /api/v1/posts/:id          (scope: posts:read)
DELETE /api/v1/posts/:id          (scope: posts:write)
GET    /api/v1/social-accounts    (scope: accounts:read)
POST   /api/v1/media              (scope: media:write)
GET    /api/v1/openapi.json       (unauthenticated)
```

**Rate limits:**

| Plan | Limit | Window |
|------|-------|--------|
| Free / Trial | 30 | per hour |
| Creator | 30 | per hour |
| Team | 100 | per hour |
| Agency | 300 | per hour |

---

## Security & Compliance

- Brand Voice from user-provided examples only — no scraping, no AI training on platform member data
- Encrypted OAuth token storage; automatic refresh
- HMAC-signed webhooks; rate limiting per user/API key
- Platform policy compliance (LinkedIn, Meta/Instagram developer terms)
- Data deletion on account disconnect
- Legal pages: `/legal/privacy`, `/legal/terms`, `/legal/cookies`, `/legal/aup`, `/legal/dpa`, `/legal/subprocessors`, `/legal/refund`, `/legal/data-rights`

Trndinn is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by LinkedIn, Microsoft, Meta, or any other connected platform.

---

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology | Status |
|-------|------------|--------|
| Frontend | Next.js, React, TypeScript | Production |
| Backend | NestJS, Node.js | Production |
| Auth | Supabase Auth + Google OAuth | Production |
| Database | Supabase PostgreSQL + RLS | Production |
| Queue | BullMQ | Production |
| Storage | MinIO (S3-compatible) | Production |
| AI Gateway | Bifrost (multi-provider) | Production |
| Payments | Polar.sh | Production |
| Analytics | PostHog | Production |

- Preferred spelling: **Trndinn** (capital T; no space)
- Tagline: All-in-One Agentic Social Media Platform
- Do not invent alternate spellings, taglines, or pricing
- Subscription checkout uses Polar; verify amounts at purchase time
